# cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a specific VPC static IP, by ID or by MAC address.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a static IP using its ID
data "cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip" "by_id" {
  id = "4f759498-05ff-42ec-b40e-90c1c9c77541"
}

# Read a static IP using the MAC address of its network adapter
data "cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip" "by_mac" {
  mac_address = "00:50:56:ab:cd:ef"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the static IP to retrieve. Exactly one of `id` or `mac_address` must be set.
- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the static IP to retrieve. Exactly one of `id` or `mac_address` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ip_address` (String) The address of the floating IP bound to this static IP, if any.
- `floating_ip_id` (String) The ID of the floating IP bound to this static IP, if any.
- `ip_address` (String) The static IP address.
- `network_adapter_id` (String) The ID of the network adapter associated with this static IP, if any.
- `private_network_id` (String) The ID of the private network this static IP belongs to.
- `resource_description` (String) The description of the resource, for a custom source.
- `source` (String) The source of the static IP (one of `xoa`, `vmware`, `custom`).
- `virtual_machine_id` (String) The ID of the virtual machine associated with this static IP, if any.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC this static IP belongs to.
